title: ExecutionRecord
description: A single row in the execution history (`state_executions`). One record per action invocation — regardless of whether the runner was CLI, Skill, or in-process.

kind.description: Which extension kind was executed. The enum has a single value today (the audit kind was removed pre-1.0); the field is preserved as a forward-compatibility lever.

extensionId.description: Id of the action that ran (e.g. `skill-summarizer`).

extensionVersion.description: Semver of the extension implementation at execution time.

nodeIds.description: Target `node.path` values. Empty for whole-graph actions.

contentHash.description: Duplicate-prevention hash used at submit time: sha256(actionId + actionVersion + bodyHash + frontmatterHash + promptTemplateHash). May be null for in-process actions that don't memoize.

status.description: Terminal status. History never stores `queued` or `running` — those live in `state_jobs` until they reach a terminal state.

failureReason.description: Normalized reason when `status = failed` or `cancelled`. Null for `completed`. `content-missing` mirrors the same enum value on `Job.failureReason`.

exitCode.description: Subprocess exit code for CLI-runner executions. Null for in-process or Skill-runner executions.

runner.description: Which runner executed this job. Null when the action runs synchronously without dispatching.

durationMs.description: Finished - started. Stored denormalized for query speed.

tokensIn.description: Input tokens reported by the runner. Null if not applicable or not reported.

tokensOut.description: Output tokens reported by the runner.

report.description: Inline report payload — the parsed JSON the runner produced, validated against the action's `reportSchemaRef` at `sm record` time. Null for actions that don't produce a report (e.g., a `failed` execution before the report could be written). Stored on `state_executions.report_json` as serialized JSON.

jobId.description: Originating job id when applicable. Null for in-process actions.
